name: Dinesh Baral
title: Founder, Unicon Infra Group
bio: Unicon Infra Group is founded by Mr. Dinesh Baral, a premier real estate investment strategist with over a decade of deep multi-market asset specialization. For years, Mr. Baral has operated exclusively within the Dholera SIR corridor, building unique, research-driven risk mitigation frameworks for retail buyers, corporate land-bankers, and HNIs worldwide.
message: Dholera is not just a real estate play; it is India's industrial tomorrow. Our mission at Unicon Infra is to democratize this generational wealth expansion with absolute operational transparency, zero legal friction, and maximum ROI.
